basic.label: Basic (0–25)
basic.meaning: No monitoring or separation of waste.
basic.typicalProfile: Facility without recycling plan or tracking.
basic.recommendedNextSteps: Start measuring total waste and set a baseline for recycling rate.

bronze.label: Bronze (26–50)
bronze.meaning: Basic separation and partial tracking in place.
bronze.typicalProfile: Smaller facility with simple bins and awareness posters.
bronze.recommendedNextSteps: Introduce monthly tracking by waste type, improve signage, and work with suppliers to reduce packaging.

silver.label: Silver (51–75)
silver.meaning: Active waste management and segregation across main waste streams.
silver.typicalProfile: Mid-size facility with established recycling and supplier collaboration.
silver.recommendedNextSteps: Add composting or anaerobic digestion for food waste; measure recycling rate quarterly.

gold.label: Gold (76–90)
gold.meaning: Advanced circular waste practices and supplier engagement.
gold.typicalProfile: Facility with waste reduction plans and traceability of outputs.
gold.recommendedNextSteps: Optimise recovery streams, expand circular packaging and refill systems, monitor waste intensity.

platinum.label: Platinum (91–100)
platinum.meaning: Exemplary waste prevention and full traceability; >90% diversion from landfill.
platinum.typicalProfile: Facility with verified performance and near zero-waste operations.
platinum.recommendedNextSteps: Share best practices, engage local community, and pursue zero-waste certification.
